title: Gonk Pyramid Christmas Crackers | Set of 6 Novelty Crackers with Hats, Jokes, Snaps & Trivia Game | Fun Family Christmas Table Crackers
features: CUTE GONK DESIGN | Bring laughter and colour to your Christmas table with these pyramid-shaped gonk crackers, featuring cheerful festive gonks in bright holiday colours
FUN FAMILY TRIVIA GAME | Each cracker includes a trivia card with questions on movies, music, food, traditions, and more, perfect for sparking laughter and conversation
CHRISTMAS CRACKERS | Each cracker is filled with a paper hat, festive motto, and satisfying snap for that timeless Christmas experience
PERFECT FOR FAMILY GATHERINGS | Ideal for Christmas dinners, parties, or game nights, these crackers guarantee fun for guests of all ages
SIZE | Set of 6 pyramid-shaped crackers 13cm, beautifully presented and ready to add a playful, festive touch to your table
